Reviews Contact

Regain Mobility in Boise

Onyx Physical Therapy helps Treasure Valley residents recover from injuries and improve movement. Our personalized approach gets you back to enjoying Boise's active lifestyle.

★★★★★ 6+ Verified Reviews

What We Do

Our Services

Professional physical therapy solutions tailored to your needs.

Post-Surgical Rehabilitation

Specialized recovery programs for patients after orthopedic procedures.

Learn More →

Sports Injury Recovery

Targeted rehabilitation for athletes and active individuals.

Learn More →

Chronic Pain Management

Non-invasive approaches to managing persistent pain conditions.

Learn More →

Balance and Fall Prevention

Programs to improve stability and reduce fall risk.

Learn More →

Workplace Injury Rehabilitation

Learn More →

Pediatric Physical Therapy

Specialized care for children with developmental challenges.

Learn More →
Flexible Options

Financing That Works With Your Goals

We believe every customer deserves access to top-quality physical therapy services. That's why we offer flexible options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path forward.

  • Low monthly payments
  • Quick approval process
  • No hidden fees

Satisfaction Guaranteed

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

After tearing my ACL playing basketball, the team at Onyx got me back on the court in time for my league's playoffs. Their knowledge of sports-specific rehab made all the difference – they even analyzed my jump mechanics to prevent future injuries. Six months post-surgery, I'm playing better than ever.

Mark T.
★★★★★

Living with fibromyalgia made Boise's winter months especially difficult. My therapist at Onyx taught me gentle exercises I could do at home that actually reduced my pain levels. The education about how weather affects pain was so helpful – I finally understand how to manage flare-ups when our temperatures swing 40 degrees in a day.

Sarah K.
★★★★★

After my husband fell twice on our icy North End driveway last winter, we knew we needed help. The balance program at Onyx gave us both confidence – they even practiced getting up from falls safely. This winter was completely different thanks to their exercises and tips for navigating Boise's variable winter conditions.

Robert and Linda P.
★★★★★

My total knee replacement recovery went so smoothly thanks to Onyx. They understood exactly how to progress my therapy to handle the hills in my Harris Ranch neighborhood. A year later, I'm hiking in the foothills pain-free for the first time in a decade. Their post-surgical care is exceptional.

Jessica M.
★★★★★

As a carpenter, I thought my back injury might end my career. Onyx's work conditioning program got me back to job sites stronger than before. They analyzed my lifting techniques and customized exercises for the exact motions I use daily. Six months later, I'm pain-free and more efficient at work.

David R.
★★★★★

Vertigo made driving Boise's winding roads terrifying. After just a month of vestibular therapy at Onyx, my symptoms improved dramatically. They explained everything so clearly and gave me exercises I could do at home. Now I can enjoy drives up to Bogus Basin without worrying about dizziness.

Amanda S.
★★★★★
Read All Reviews →
How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Assessment

Our team will thoroughly assess your needs and discuss the best options for your care.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced team handles everything with precision and care, ensuring your comfort throughout.

04

Follow-Up

We follow up to ensure your complete satisfaction and answer any questions about your ongoing care.

Who We Are

A Local Business For Your Local Community

Our Promise

Why Choose Onyx Physical Therapy

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards for every patient — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every patient we help strengthens the community we call home.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing what we say we'll do — every single time.

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

How soon after surgery can I start physical therapy?
This depends on your specific procedure, but most post-surgical rehab begins within 1-2 weeks. We'll coordinate timing with your surgeon to ensure proper healing has begun before starting therapy.
Will therapy be painful?
We aim to keep discomfort manageable while still making progress. Some soreness is normal, but we'll adjust your program if you experience sharp pain during exercises.

Excellence. Community. Integrity.
That's Onyx Physical Therapy.

Ready to get started? Fill out the form and our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
